arts.ttl: United, City, Liverpool, Arsenal... Premier League clubs at risk of UEFA exclusion
arts.sum: UEFA has warned the English authorities that the UK and Ireland’s bid to host Euro 2028 could be at risk if the UK government proceeds with its plan to create an independent regulator to oversee football. The letter warns that the maximum sanction for such interference could be the exclusion of the Football Association (FA) and its teams from UEFA competitions.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans left furious as Liverpool star avoids red card after copying Declan Rice
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szobszlai was not shown a second yellow card for booting the ball away - just weeks after Arsenal's Declan Rice was sent off for doing so

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Arsenal LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups with Martin Odegaard set to miss out
arts.sum: Spurs host the first North London derby of the season on Sunday as Arsenal visit looking to remind the league of their title credentials

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea looking to raid English club for 17-year-old midfield prodigy
arts.sum: Premier League giants Arsenal and Chelsea are keen on signing Stoke City midfield sensation Souleymane Sidibe. Both London clubs were quite busy during the recently concluded transfer window. They did some impressive bit of business and managed to further bolster their squad. arts.ttl: Solanke goal, Arsenal exploit Tottenham problem - Supercomputer predicts North London Derby result - football.london
arts.sum: "In a thrilling North London Derby at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, Spurs and Arsenal played out an entertaining 2-2 draw on Super Sunday. Tottenham Hotspur have home advantage for the first North London Derby of the 2024/25 Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Tottenham star drops major North London Derby team news hint before Arsenal game
arts.sum: Richarlison has dropped a major hint that Dominic Solanke could be starting for Tottenham in the North London Derby showdown with Arsenal. Ange Postecoglou was non-committal - if hopeful - that Solanke would feature in the North London Derby when the Tottenham manager staged his pre-match press conference .

arts.ttl: Arsenal red card, Solanke the Tottenham hero - North London Derby predictions - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: When Tottenham Hotspur meet Arsenal there are usually fireworks and despite it being an early season match-up, there is plenty on the line. But now I always think Arsenal will win and that comes from the confidence that Mikel Arteta has given to me and plenty of other Gunners fans around the world; the knowledge that this side is capable of beating anyone.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted team vs Arsenal with late Yves Bissouma decision made as Solanke starts
arts.sum: Postecoglou had good news though on the injury front with Micky van de Ven and Dominic Solanke back in full training with the squad. Here's our predicted Tottenham Hotspur team to face Arsenal in Sunday's first North London Derby of the Premier League season

arts.ttl: Arsenal's underdog status for north London derby is laughable - Mikel Arteta knows what a proper crisis is
arts.sum: Arsenal's recent brilliance means events from the early Arteta years feel like they occurred in a bygone era. Arteta's early woes laugh in the face of the media-driven narrative that's gained some momentum heading into Sunday's north London derby.
